title: raukaua edgerleyi var. serratus
intro: Raukaua edgerleyi var. serratus, also known as the Serrate Raukaua or Kawakawa relative, is a plant species within the family Araliaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in New Zealand, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Raukaua edgerleyi var. serratus include relief from pain, fever reduction, and wound healing, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Raukaua edgerleyi var. serratus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various forms of administration.
